subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Merriman and Mr Reed, spoken on 1912-10-08
subcodes.first_line: It was a day of happiness for me, too. What I discussed this morning was evident as the sun. That was the fundamental oneness of phenomena.
subcodes.subjects: @intuition; inspiration, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
